items.title: iOS 27 makes your iPhone faster in 30+ ways
items.summary: The iOS 27 public beta is now available , and one of the big changes is that it makes your iPhone a lot faster. In fact, Apple has outlined more than 30 ways in which your iPhone will be faster after you update.

items.title: CEO Interview with Mohit Gupta of TYLsemi
items.summary: Mohit Gupta founded TYLsemi to build chiplet-based intelligent power and connectivity solutions for AI infrastructure-an area where custom silicon has long been underserved. TYLsemi exists to provide the foundational chiplet platform that...

items.title: Chinese Wuling Bingo could come to North America as an entry-level Chevy EV
items.summary: The Geo Metro has reached legendary status among hyper-milers and fuel efficiency fans, and if the rumors are to be believed, it could be getting a spiritual successor in the form of a Chevy-badged Wuling Bingo EV for global markets.

items.title: 'AppleCare One' is Now Even More Valuable
items.summary: While the monthly and annual prices of AppleCare+ plans for Macs and iPads received a slight increase this week, AppleCare One continues to start at $19.99 per month in the U.S., making the multi-device plan even more valuable. Launched in...

items.title: Top Stories: iOS 27 and macOS Golden Gate Public Betas, Apple Back to School Promo, and
items.summary: Following through on its promise of a July release, Apple delivered the first public betas of iOS 27, macOS Golden Gate, and more this week, opening up testing to a broader audience. This week also saw Apple's annual Back to School...

items.title: Apple Raises iPhone Prices in Japan
items.summary: After raising prices on all Macs and iPads worldwide last month, Apple has now increased the price of iPhone models in Japan. As spotted by the Spanish blog iPhoneros , the iPhone 16, iPhone 17e, iPhone 17, iPhone Air, iPhone 17 Pro, and...

items.title: iPhone 18 Pro Launching in Two Months With These 12 New Features
items.summary: It is now mid-July, and that means the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max are now just two months away. The devices are expected to look similar to the iPhone 17 Pro and iPhone 17 Pro Max, but there will still be many year-over-year...

items.title: Netflix paid $587M for Ben Affleck's AI filmmaking startup
items.summary: Netflix revealed that it paid $587 million in cash for InterPositive, a startup co-founded by Ben Affleck.

items.title: Strapping 11 fans and a 360mm AIO to an RTX 3080 sounds crazy until you see the 30°C temp drop - modded GPU delivered less than 5 FPS uplift at turbojet noise levels
items.summary: TrashBench recently decided to test whether adding more and more fans to a powerful GPU would improve its performance.

items.title: What Type of Bluetooth Beacon Does Cisco Spaces Use?
items.summary: Cisco Spaces uses generic Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) beacons rather than one proprietary beacon type. It can detect and process beacons from multiple vendors and is broadly protocol-agnostic. Note that the information on the Cisco Spaces...
